prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to education policy discussions and decisions made by the UK government, which primarily applies to England. Education is a devolved matter, meaning that Scotland has its separate education system and policies. Therefore, the content of this meeting does not apply to Scotland.
